Using `fields()` fetches all columns from both ARTICLES and ARTICLE_SOURCES tables, which retrieves unnecessary data and can impact performance. Instead, explicitly select only the required columns: ARTICLES.ARTICLE_ID, ARTICLES.ARTICLE_TITLE, ARTICLES.ARTICLE_URL, ARTICLES.ARTICLE_ADDED, ARTICLE_SOURCES.SOURCE_ID, and ARTICLE_SOURCES.SOURCE_NAME.
